headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Initiates $2B Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the oversold stocks to buy right now. headline: How The Duke Energy (DUK) Investment Story Is Shifting With Data Center And Policy Risks
summary: Duke Energy’s latest fair value price target has been adjusted slightly, moving from US$139.39 to US$138.61 per share. That small trim lines up with a broader set of analyst updates, where price targets cluster near or just above current fair value assumptions while also reflecting concerns about permitting, political pushback around data centers, and recent trims from firms such as JPMorgan. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch...

headline: How The Ameren (AEE) Story Is Shifting With Data Center Growth And Mixed Analyst Views
summary: Ameren’s blended fair value estimate has shifted slightly, edging from US$120.40 to about US$119.87 per share. This keeps it broadly in line with the wider range of analyst price targets between US$110 and US$126. That small adjustment reflects a mix of upbeat views on long term growth drivers like data center related load and transmission projects, set against more cautious sector wide revisions and valuation resets from firms that have recently trimmed their targets. headline: How Recent Analyst Shifts Are Rewriting the Story for Exelon (EXC)
